title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW) – Agenda – 2021-02-23 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW): Agenda
Date and Time: February 23, 2021- 11:00 am-5:00 pm, EST Location: Virtual Chairperson: Lorraine Greaves (Chair), Louise Pilote (Vice-chair) Secretariat: Jenna Griffiths, Olufunmilola (Funmi) Adedeji, Laetitia Guillemette Participants: SAC-HPW members, invited guest speakers and Health Canada employees
In-camera Session SAC-HPW members only
Welcome and Opening Remarks Chief Medical Advisor, Health Canada and Senior Medical Advisor for Health Products and Food Branch (HPFB)
Chair's Address, Introduction of Members, Review of Affiliations and Interests (A&I), Review of Agenda Chair
Health Canada Presentation - Actions in Response to SAC-HPW Comments and Past Recommendations Director General, Medical Devices Directorate (MDD)
Session #1: SGBA+ Considerations in the Development / Review of Health Canada Authorized COVID-19 Vaccines Biologic and Radiopharmaceutical Drugs Directorate (BRDD)
Session #1: Committee Deliberations/ Recommendations SAC-HPW members
Session #2: Role of SGBA+ in COVID-19 Vaccination Roll-out to Priority Groups National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI) Secretariat
Session #2: Committee Deliberations/Recommendations SAC-HPW members
Session #3: Patient Experiences/Perspectives on Breast Implant Products Guest speakers
Session #3: Committee Deliberations/Recommendations SAC-HPW members
Session #4: Post-market Activities on Breast Implants MDD
Session #4: Committee Deliberations/Recommendations SAC-HPW members
Session #5: Potential Proposal of an ICH Reflection Paper / Guidance Document on Equity / Diversity in Drug Development and Post-Market Activities BRDD
Session #5: Committee Deliberations/Recommendations SAC-HPW members
Summary of Recommendations and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
In-camera Session SAC-HPW members only
